cards.back: A measure of how much two variables change together, calculated as the expected value of the product of the deviations from the mean of each variable
A statistical measure of the strength and direction of the linear relationship between two variables, ranging from -1 to 1
A measure of the linear correlation between two variables, ranging from -1 to 1
A relationship where as one variable increases, the other variable also tends to increase
A relationship where as one variable increases, the other variable tends to decrease
